```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.95em;text-align:left;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.95em 1em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(44,132,117,0.1);border-top:4px solid #2C8475;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:baseline;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:0.55em;">
    <div>
     <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">pattern A</div>
     <div style="font-size:0.78em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;">Global folder</div>
    </div>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#3DA18A;background:#E5F2EE;padding:0.2em 0.55em;border-radius:999px;letter-spacing:0.06em;text-transform:uppercase;">simplest</div>
   </div>
   <div style="background:#F8FBFA;border-radius:8px;padding:0.5em 0.7em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;line-height:1.7;color:#1F5E54;margin-bottom:0.5em;">
    <div><span style="color:#2C8475;font-weight:700;">~/.claude/skills/&lt;name&gt;/</span></div>
    <div style="color:#9B8EA0;">↓</div>
    <div>project/.claude/skills/</div>
   </div>
   <ul style="list-style:none;padding:0;margin:0;font-size:0.5em;line-height:1.55;color:#564232;">
    <li>· <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#2C8475;">ln -s</code> per project</li>
    <li>· add to <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#2C8475;">.gitignore</code></li>
   </ul>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.95em 1em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(196,136,26,0.1);border-top:4px solid #C4881A;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:baseline;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:0.55em;">
    <div>
     <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">pattern B</div>
     <div style="font-size:0.78em;font-weight:700;color:#C4881A;">Skills repo</div>
    </div>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#C4881A;background:#FEF5E7;padding:0.2em 0.55em;border-radius:999px;letter-spacing:0.06em;text-transform:uppercase;">version-controlled</div>
   </div>
   <div style="background:#FFFBF0;border-radius:8px;padding:0.5em 0.7em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;line-height:1.7;color:#7A5410;margin-bottom:0.5em;">
    <div><span style="color:#C4881A;font-weight:700;">~/code/my-skills/</span></div>
    <div style="color:#9B8EA0;">↓ pick &amp; link</div>
    <div>project/.claude/skills/</div>
   </div>
   <ul style="list-style:none;padding:0;margin:0;font-size:0.5em;line-height:1.55;color:#564232;">
    <li>· canonical in a <strong>git repo</strong></li>
    <li>· bonus: shareable</li>
   </ul>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
